summary: Founded Stayza, a student hostel discovery platform, and led product development, engineering, hiring, quality assurance, and business operations from concept to launch.
highlights: Built and launched the platform from the ground up, including frontend development, backend integration, and production deployment.
Implemented core features such as hostel listings, user authentication, role-based access, verification workflows, and an admin dashboard.
Managed recruitment by reviewing applications, interviewing candidates, onboarding interns, and coordinating team activities.
Led quality assurance through functional testing, bug tracking, and continuous product improvements.
Conducted market research, competitor analysis, and business development to support product growth.

summary: Built and shipped frontend features for production web applications, integrated an AI-powered chatbot, and worked directly with the team to resolve bugs and improve performance.
highlights: Built and refined production frontend components in React and TypeScript.
Integrated an AI-powered chatbot into the product's web application.
Implemented authentication and backend data flows using Supabase and PostgreSQL.
Shipped new features, resolved bugs, and improved application performance alongside the team.
